message.thinking:
We need to answer each of the three questions: 1. Chapters, 2. Description, 3. Structure. Provide JSON array of three objects.

For each: "question" field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure".

We must evaluate the given text.

Text: "Bachelor’s work structure: Šis darbs ir sadalīts divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā. Teorētiskā daļa sniedz šī darba kontekstu. Tās saturs ir sadalīts trīs daļās. Pirmajā daļā ir izskaidrots vispārējais evakuācijas princips un evakuācijas principi slēgtās telpās, nodrošinot vispārīgu tēmas kontekstu. Otrajā daļā tiek analizēti Xiaomi arēnas plāni un izvērtētas tās evakuācijas iespējas. Trešajā daļā aplūkoti citi pētījumi, kas ir vērsti uz līdzīgām tēmām."

We need to answer:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? It mentions "divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā" and then says the theoretical part has three subparts. So main sections: Theoretical, Practical. So yes, it lists main sections. So compliance: True. Feedback: highlight strong parts: lists main sections; mention subparts.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes theoretical part's three subparts, but doesn't describe practical part. So partly: the description of theoretical parts is there, but lacks description of practical part. So does it briefly describe contents of each section? No, because practical part not described. So compliance false. Feedback: mention missing description of practical part.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It says two main parts, theoretical has three subparts; but practical part not described; still general structure? The student might not fully understand overall structure because missing practical part details. The text indicates some structure but not complete. So maybe compliance false. Provide feedback: missing practical part description; structure not fully clear; need to mention practical part content.

Thus produce JSON array with three objects.

Make sure to include "question" values as strings "Chapters", "Description", "Structure".

Return as array.
